---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: [enhancement, triage]
assignees: []
---

<!--
We love feature requests. Please be specific about the problem first — a
well-articulated problem usually points at the right solution.
-->

## Problem

What's broken, missing, or painful today? Concrete examples beat abstractions.

> Example: "When I spawn a project with the `python-ml` template, the
> devcontainer takes 14 minutes to build because every feature reinstalls
> CUDA from scratch."

## Proposal

What do you think we should do about it?

- API / CLI surface (if applicable):
- Behavioral change (if applicable):
- Migration story for existing users:

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh? Why did you reject them?

## Additional context

- Links to related issues, PRs, or upstream discussions:
- Screenshots, mockups, or sample output:
- Are you willing to help implement this? (Totally fine to say no.)
